topics: Introduction: Definition of Instrumentation, Concept of an Instrument, Basic Principles of Measurements, Various Elements in a Measuring Instrument (Sensing, Transducing, Manipulating, and Functioning Elements), Principles of Working with a Suitable Example
Static and Dynamic Characteristics of Measuring Instruments, Simple Problems with Characteristics

Temperature Measurements: Temperature Scales, Basic Principles and Working of Thermometers (Mercury in Glass, Bimetallic, Resistance Temperature Detectors, Thermistors, Thermocouples) and Pyrometers (Optical, Radiation)
Ranges of Different Types of Temperature Measuring Instruments
Sources of Errors and Precautions in Temperature Measurements
Pressure Measurement: Basic Principles and Working of Manometers, Bourdon Gauge, Bellow Element, and Diaphragm Element
Pressure to Electrical Transducers: Different Types
Vacuum Measurement: Different Types, Basic Principles and Working of McLeod Gauge, Knudsen Gauge, Radioactive Vacuum Gauge, Thermal Conductivity Gauges, Ionization Gauge
Level Measurement: Direct Type and Indirect Type, Differential Pressure Method for Pressurized Vessels, Conductivity Meters, Solid Level Detectors

Flow Measurements: Liquid and Gas Flow Measurements, Different Types of Measuring Instruments, Basic Principles and Working of Quantity Meters, Coriolis Meter, Gas Meters, Magnetic Flow Meters, Variable Area Meters, Rotameters, Turbine Meters, Weirs and Notches, Head Meters, Pitot Tube, Orifice Meters, Venturi Meters
pH Measurement Using a Calomel Electrode
Composition Analysis: List of Methods with Their Advantages and Limitations (Spectroscopic Methods, Chromatography Methods, Conductivity Methods)
Developments of P and I Diagram for Flow Systems, Level, pH Control, Temperature Control, Heat Exchangers, Distillation Column, CSTR, Single Effect Evaporator
